content:
✨ Telegram-Drive | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide users with a free, unlimited, and secure cloud storage solution by leveraging their existing Telegram accounts.
✨ Key Features: • Unlimited Cloud Storage • High Performance Grid • Auto-Updates • Media Streaming • PDF Viewer
📖 Summary: Telegram Drive is an open-source desktop application that transforms your Telegram account into a secure, unlimited cloud storage solution. It provides a familiar file explorer interface for managing files directly on Telegram's servers using its API.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
